name: Chick Pea & Basmati Rice Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss together chick peas, rice, bell peppers, and scallions in a large bowl.
2. Whisk together toasted sesame seeds, sesame oil, cumin, lemon juice, olive oil, and salt until combined.
3. Pour the vinaigrette over the salad and toss to coat evenly.
4. Season to taste with additional salt if needed.
